S.FORM: Jon Brockman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1987, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 3, Jon Brockman, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Jon Brockman sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1987, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 3, Jon Brockman, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *on βroʦ~ʨkman s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *on βroʦ~ʨkman, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
